prompt: All ADRs in docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-application-platform/adrs/ are accepted. tech-requirements.md has TR-01 through TR-08. Compose tech-design.md.

assertions.text: detects that TR-08 has no ADR addressing it
does NOT produce a complete tech-design.md that papers over TR-08
proposes returning to Stage 2 to draft an ADR for TR-08
actually reads the existing ADRs and tech-requirements.md to verify the gap (rather than trusting the prompt)
if a tech-design.md is produced, it explicitly flags TR-08 as uncovered rather than inventing a realization
